task:
Open /home/user/Documents/quadrants.png in GIMP — a 400x400 image with four colored quadrants: top-left red, top-right green, bottom-left blue, bottom-right yellow.

Rotate the entire image 180 degrees (so top-left becomes bottom-right, etc.) and export the result as a TIFF file to /home/user/Documents/quadrants_rotated.tiff. The output must remain 400x400 pixels, with the originally-yellow bottom-right quadrant now in the top-left, the originally-red top-left now in the bottom-right, and the originally-green top-right now in the bottom-left.

verification.description: Pixel (50,50) is now yellow (was bottom-right before 180 rotation)
Pixel (350,350) is now red (was top-left before 180 rotation)
Pixel (50,350) is now green (was top-right before 180 rotation)
